_comment: Claude Code MCP config for the Gaffer factory: the two data-plane MCP servers the agent delivers through. tick.sh renders a runtime copy, substituting ${DISPATCH_DB}/${MEMORY_DB} (runtime DB copies) and ${DISPATCH_MCP_BIN}/${MEMORY_MCP_BIN} (the built dist bins, resolved from factory.config.sh). Build the workspace first: pnpm -r build.
